textByHashes.1f03e37c7be5c46239f279d6fc8490ed05c578fa: Why, yes I am. Why do you ask?
textByHashes.4daccbc055384395df182a6d241fa018e7005f4e: No, I'm afraid I don't know anything about that.
textByHashes.6ab86801258164910eaa503f263820e4590fa8a3: I've already told you everything I suspect.
textByHashes.bbe3d9e2f76416dc031e635605c33d704f7792cd: I don't think the crops ARE failing, now leave me alone, I have work to do.
textByHashes.4043030ce24ef181ac8bf7f96e7fac086b8364ef: I am, but this isn't a good time to talk about that.
